recent: because	since；as；due to the fact that。
真正有效的方法，不是最复杂的方法，而是最能长期执行的方法。	A truly effective method is not the most complicated one, but the one you can carry out over the long run.
及时复盘错误能提高学习效率。	Reviewing mistakes in time can improve learning efficiency.
Input without review is easy to forget.	只有输入没有复习，很容易遗忘。
